speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: السلام علیکم، میں لاہور میں 10 مرلہ پلاٹ کی قیمت جاننا چاہتا ہوں
speaker_turns.roman: Assalam o Alaikum, main Lahore mein 10 marla plot ki qeemat janna chahta hoon
speaker_turns.english: Hello, I want to know the price of a 10 marla plot in Lahore

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: وعلیکم السلام، بہت اچھا۔ آپ کو کس علاقے میں پلاٹ چاہیے؟
speaker_turns.roman: Wa Alaikum Assalam, bahut achha. Aap ko kis ilaqay mein plot chahiye?
speaker_turns.english: Hello, very good. Which area do you want the plot in?

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: مجھے بحریہ ٹاؤن میں گھر چاہیے
speaker_turns.roman: Mujhe Bahria Town mein ghar chahiye
speaker_turns.english: I need a house in Bahria Town

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: جی، آپ کا بجٹ کیا ہے؟
speaker_turns.roman: Ji, aap ka budget kya hai?
speaker_turns.english: Yes, what is your budget?

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: السلام علیکم، میں ایکس وائی زیڈ ریئلٹی سے بات کر رہا ہوں۔ کیا آپ ابھی پراپرٹی خریدنے میں دلچسپی رکھتے ہیں؟
speaker_turns.roman: Assalam o Alaikum, main XYZ Realty se baat kar raha hoon. Kya aap abhi property khareedne mein dilchaspi rakhte hain?
speaker_turns.english: Hello, I'm calling from XYZ Realty. Are you interested in buying property now?

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: جی ہاں، میں اسلام آباد میں فلیٹ ڈھونڈ رہا ہوں
speaker_turns.roman: Ji haan, main Islamabad mein flat dhoond raha hoon
speaker_turns.english: Yes, I'm looking for a flat in Islamabad

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: گھر تین کمروں کا ہے، 1200 سکوائر فٹ، مین بلیوارڈ کے قریب
speaker_turns.roman: Ghar teen kamron ka hai, 1200 square feet, Main Boulevard ke qareeb
speaker_turns.english: The house has three bedrooms, 1200 square feet, near Main Boulevard

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: بہت اچھا، قیمت کیا ہے؟
speaker_turns.roman: Bahut achha, qeemat kya hai?
speaker_turns.english: Very good, what's the price?

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: ڈی ایچ اے لاہور میں کوئی پلاٹ دستیاب ہے؟
speaker_turns.roman: DHA Lahore mein koi plot available hai?
speaker_turns.english: Is any plot available in DHA Lahore?

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: جی ہاں، فیز 6 میں دو پلاٹ موجود ہیں
speaker_turns.roman: Ji haan, Phase 6 mein do plot mojood hain
speaker_turns.english: Yes, two plots are available in Phase 6

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: آپ کا بجٹ کیا ہے؟
speaker_turns.roman: Aap ka budget kya hai?
speaker_turns.english: What is your budget?

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: میرا بجٹ 80 لاکھ سے 1 کروڑ ہے
speaker_turns.roman: Mera budget 80 lakh se 1 crore hai
speaker_turns.english: My budget is 80 lakh to 1 crore

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: گھر میں کتنے کمرے ہیں؟
speaker_turns.roman: Ghar mein kitne kamre hain?
speaker_turns.english: How many rooms are in the house?

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: تین کمرے، دو باتھ رومز اور ایک کچن ہے
speaker_turns.roman: Teen kamre, do bathrooms aur ek kitchen hai
speaker_turns.english: Three bedrooms, two bathrooms and one kitchen

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: قبضہ کب مل سکتا ہے؟
speaker_turns.roman: Qabza kab mil sakta hai?
speaker_turns.english: When can I get possession?

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: فوری قبضہ دستیاب ہے
speaker_turns.roman: Fori qabza available hai
speaker_turns.english: Immediate possession is available

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: کیا قسطوں پر دستیاب ہے؟
speaker_turns.roman: Kya qiston par available hai?
speaker_turns.english: Is it available on installments?

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: جی ہاں، تین سال کی پیمنٹ پلان ہے
speaker_turns.roman: Ji haan, teen saal ki payment plan hai
speaker_turns.english: Yes, there's a 3-year payment plan

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: میں پراپرٹی دیکھنا چاہتا ہوں، کب آ سکتا ہوں؟
speaker_turns.roman: Main property dekhna chahta hoon, kab aa sakta hoon?
speaker_turns.english: I want to see the property, when can I come?

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: آپ کل صبح 11 بجے آ سکتے ہیں
speaker_turns.roman: Aap kal subah 11 baje aa sakte hain
speaker_turns.english: You can come tomorrow at 11 AM

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: پلاٹ کی سائز کیا ہے؟
speaker_turns.roman: Plot ki size kya hai?
speaker_turns.english: What is the plot size?

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: 5 مرلہ کا پلاٹ ہے
speaker_turns.roman: 5 marla ka plot hai
speaker_turns.english: It's a 5 marla plot

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: گھر فرنش ہے یا خالی؟
speaker_turns.roman: Ghar furnished hai ya khaali?
speaker_turns.english: Is the house furnished or empty?

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: بالکل فرنش ہے، فرنیچر کے ساتھ
speaker_turns.roman: Bilkul furnished hai, furniture ke saath
speaker_turns.english: Fully furnished with furniture

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: تجارتی دکان چاہیے، بلیو ایریا میں
speaker_turns.roman: Tijarati dukaan chahiye, Blue Area mein
speaker_turns.english: I need a commercial shop in Blue Area

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: کونے کی دکان دستیاب ہے، 500 سکوائر فٹ
speaker_turns.roman: Corner ki dukaan available hai, 500 square feet
speaker_turns.english: Corner shop available, 500 square feet

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: کرائے پر فلیٹ چاہیے، گلبرگ میں
speaker_turns.roman: Kiraye par flat chahiye, Gulberg mein
speaker_turns.english: I need a flat for rent in Gulberg

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: ماہانہ کرایہ 40 ہزار ہے
speaker_turns.roman: Mahana kiraya 40 hazar hai
speaker_turns.english: Monthly rent is 40 thousand

speaker_turns.speaker: customer
speaker_turns.urdu: قیمت میں کچھ کمی ہو سکتی ہے؟
speaker_turns.roman: Qeemat mein kuch kami ho sakti hai?
speaker_turns.english: Can the price be reduced?

speaker_turns.speaker: agent
speaker_turns.urdu: آخری قیمت 95 لاکھ ہے
speaker_turns.roman: Aakhri qeemat 95 lakh hai
speaker_turns.english: Final price is 95 lakh
